_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to operator_decisions.json and fill in the values to lock the pre-registration. once committed, these decisions are LOCKED for the duration of the bet-0 arc. lowering h1_abandon_rho below 0.40 is rejected by run_bet0_phase1.py.
